model.model_name: PELE, Elo, and team-quality adjusted Poisson score model
model.plain_language_summary: Estimate each team's expected goals from PELE-backed attack/defense proxies, team-quality gap, Elo gap, PELE rating gap, Tilt, and host-venue boost. Convert expected goals into scoreline probabilities with a Poisson score grid.

future_upgrade_triggers.v2: Upgrade after final squads, official fantasy prices, official scoring rules, injuries, and pre-tournament national-team form are imported and a backtest/calibration pass is possible.

model_notes: PELE ratings are imported from Silver Bulletin Datawrapper CSV downloads and are not inferred.
PELE rating, Tilt, and round-robin offense/defense fields are used as model inputs.
The model still uses no betting odds, final squads, injuries, official fantasy prices, or official fantasy scoring rules.

fixtureScorePredictions.source_note: Prototype score prediction from data/fixtures.json and PELE-backed data/teamQuality.json. No betting odds, final squads, injuries, official fantasy prices, or official fantasy scoring are used.

caveats: Expected goals are model estimates, not source-provided bookmaker odds or official projections.
The model does not yet include final squads, player availability, injuries, tactics, official fantasy scoring, or betting odds.
Poisson assumes independent team goal counts; Dixon-Coles or similar low-score correction is reserved for a later version.
